question: Did the founder of the company that currently owns anito-cel attend a university located in the same city where the Battle of Bunker Hill occurred?

chain.fact: Gilead Sciences is the company that currently owns anito-cel.
Gilead was founded by Michael L. Riordan.
Michael L. Riordan attended Harvard University, located in Cambridge/Boston.
The Battle of Bunker Hill took place in Boston.

role_reference: the founder of the company that currently owns anito-cel
